heading: Inapplicability of the Administrative Procedure Act
label: 3625 Inapplicability of the Administrative Procedure Act
text: The provisions of sections 554 and 555 and 701 through 706 of title 5, United States Code, do not apply to the making of any determination, decision, or order under this subchapter.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , and applicable only to offenses committed after the taking effect of this section, see , set out as a note under .Nov. 1, 1987section 235(a)(1) of Pub. L. 98–473section 3551 of this title
